2606.21151.title: Context-Aware Generative AI for Automated Telecom Test Script Generation
2606.21151.paper_summary: Automated test generation for telecom software systems and networks has advanced significantly with the adoption of machine learning and rule-based approaches. However, most existing solutions generate static test suites against a snapshot of the system; as code, configurations, topologies, and key performance indicators (KPIs) evolve, these tests quickly become outdated or misaligned with the live system. There is currently no widely adopted solution that continuously detects fine-grained changes and selectively adapts only the affected tests without regenerating entire test suites. This paper presents a context-aware generative AI framework for automated telecom test script generation that treats testing as a continuously adapting process driven by the current state of the system rather than a static artifact. The central contribution is delta-conditioned test generation over a live knowledge graph: our approach employs a continuously updated knowledge graph (KG) as a single source of truth, a delta engine for fine-grained change detection, and a KG-guided generative AI agent, operating via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), to create, update, or retire test cases automatically. We further integrate Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to enrich reasoning with telecom-domain knowledge and historical artifacts. We demonstrate applicability across software-system and telecom-network use cases, including a Python-based KPI monitoring application managed in GitLab, and show how the framework reduces manual effort, improves test relevance, and accelerates test cycles.
2606.21151.paper_summary_zh: 自動化測試生成在電信軟體系統和網路方面隨著機器學習和基於規則的方法的採用而顯著進步。<lb/>然而，大多數現有解決方案是針對系統快照生成靜態測試套件；隨著代碼、配置、拓撲和關鍵績效指標（KPI）的演變，這些測試很快就會過時或與實時系統不匹配。<lb/>目前尚無廣泛採用的解決方案能夠持續檢測細粒度變更，並僅選擇性地調整受影響的測試，而無需重新生成整個測試套件。<lb/>本文提出了一個上下文感知的生成式人工智慧框架，用於自動化電信測試腳本生成，將測試視為一個根據系統當前狀態持續適應的過程，而非靜態的產物。<lb/>其核心貢獻是基於實時知識圖的增量條件測試生成：我們的方法使用不斷更新的知識圖（KG）作為唯一的真實來源，並利用增量引擎進行細粒度變更檢測，以及通過模型上下文協議（MCP）運作的KG引導生成式AI代理，自動創建、更新或退役測試案例。<lb/>我們進一步整合檢索增強生成（RAG），以豐富電信領域知識和歷史文物的推理。<lb/>我們展示了該框架在軟體系統和電信網路用例中的適用性，包括在GitLab中管理的基於Python的KPI監控應用程式，並展示了該框架如何減少手動工作、提高測試相關性並加快測試週期。
2606.21151.author: Gautam Prasad et.al.
2606.21151.authors: Gautam Prasad, Chandramohan T. N., Joy Bose
